arts.ttl: Arteta expected Chelsea to be title 'contenders'
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says he expected Chelsea to be "contenders" to win the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Joleon Lescott says £40m Chelsea player wouldn’t be a starter if Antonio Conte was still manager
arts.sum: Antonio Conte is one of the greatest managers Chelsea have had in the modern era. For all of his flaws, Antonio Conte led Chelsea to...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes surprise Premier League title 'contenders' admission before Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has been full of praise for Chelsea and their manager Enzo Maresca.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree deal with Las Palmas talent
arts.sum: A temporary member of the midfield ranks at La Liga outfit Las Palmas is inching towards a move to England with big-spending Chelsea this summer. That’s according to transfer insider…

arts.ttl: Man Utd could ruin Arsenal Nico Williams transfer with £60m swoop
arts.sum: Arsenal seemingly will face an uphill battle, despite Arteta's desire to sign Williams, who reportedly wants to stay in Spain and is said to be keen on a move to Catalonia. Last summer, when Williams was also linked with a move to both Arsenal and Barcelona, he revealed: "It's always good to hear things from the outside, it means I'm doing my job well.

arts.ttl: Chelsea start new signing vs Arsenal as Jadon Sancho dropped and seven return for Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Changed Chelsea XI vs Arsenal: Sanchez; James, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Fernandez, Lavia; Palmer, Neto, George. The gap to Newcastle in sixth is currently only two points but could be five before the end of the weekend - albeit with Maresca having played one more game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal close in on summer signing, deal at ‘advanced stage’ – Ornstein
arts.sum: Arsenal’s pursuit of Martin Zubimendi is now at an advanced stage, according to David Ornstein. With Andrea Berta stepping in as the new sporting director, Arsenal are expected to spend big this summer. In fact, they could break their own transfer records as they push to finally turn title hopes into reality. arts.ttl: Gittens to Chelsea: Dortmund star could be 'REALLY CHEAP'
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens could be 'really cheap' this summer if his club miss out on the Champions League, according to German media. The Bundesliga slapped a prohibitive price tag of €100 million on his head to deter his suitors, of which there are many, particularly in England.

arts.ttl: One down, three to go: Chelsea on course for quadruple after League Cup win
arts.sum: Chelsea's bid to win four trophies was kick-started with a 2-1 win over Man City in the League Cup final. The Blues are yet to lose a game this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea told how much they need to pay for “powerful” Tottenham target
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham will have to fork out in excess of £20 million to sign Sunderland star Jobe Bellingham. Jobe Bellingham could end up parting ways with Sunderland in the summer and there are quite a few top clubs that are keen on signing the English youth international.
